attributes.action: Keep 5-Year Settlement for Students who switched to Health & Care Visas
attributes.additional_details: Thousands of students entered the UK through legitimate, highly-regulated routes. Many first contributed significantly to the UK economy as international students, paying high tuition fees to UK universities. UK graduates have already spent years integrated into British society, mastered the English language, and adopted UK professional standards.They chose to stay and serve in care sector based on a genuine passion for public service, with a legal promise of a 5-year path to settlement.
attributes.background: We ask the Government to maintain the current 5-year qualifying period for Indefinite Leave to Remain (ILR) for all Health and Care Worker visa holders who hold a UK university degree.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/745684
